title: Shri Saraswati Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Saraswati Mata Ki Aarti and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Saraswati.
description:
Jai Saraswati Mata,
Maiya Jai Saraswati Mata.
Sadgun vaibhav shalini,
Tribhuvan vikhyata॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Chandravadani padmasini,
Dyuti mangalkari.
Sohe shubh hans savari,
Atul tejdhari॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Baayein kar mein veena,
Kar mein pustak rajai.
Neeche kar mein mala,
Ati shubh mukh sajai॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Kar saroj mein pustak,
Shashi sam dyuti nyari.
Bhandar avidya mitave,
Maiya vidya ki dhari॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Tum hi ho jag janani,
Tum hi ho gyani.
Sabki buddhi vidhata,
Tum hi ho kalyani॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Andhkar ko harti,
Gyan prakash lati.
Maiya sab par kripa,
Nirantar barsati॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

Maa Saraswati ki aarti,
Jo koi nar gaave.
Kahat Shivanand Swami,
Gyan-bhakti paave॥
॥ Jai Saraswati Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Saraswati Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to seek blessings for wisdom, knowledge, intellect, and proficiency in arts.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for Saraswati Puja and Aarti?
faq.a2: Basant Panchami is the most auspicious day; however, Thursdays are also considered favorable.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Goddess Saraswati during Aarti?
faq.a3: Goddess Saraswati is fond of white flowers, white sweets, and Kheer (milk-based dishes).
faq.q4: Can Saraswati Mata's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, students and artists can perform the Aarti at home with full devotion.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti to gain knowledge?
faq.a5: Chanting the mantra 'Om Aing Saraswatye Namah' after the Aarti is highly effective for gaining wisdom.
